description_long: This object is a realistic representation of a crab, featuring a broad, slightly domed carapace with a sandy beige coloration. The crab has two prominent, asymmetrical claws (chelae), with one noticeably larger than the other, and eight segmented walking legs that curve outward from the body. The surface of the shell appears rough and matte, with subtle textural details suggesting a hard exoskeleton. The underside is flatter and lighter in color, with visible segmentation and jointed appendages. No antennae or eyes are distinctly visible, giving the crab a somewhat stylized appearance. The overall form is compact and robust, typical of crabs found in coastal or urban seafood markets.
description: A sandy beige crab with a broad shell, two large claws, and eight segmented legs, featuring a rough, matte surface and realistic anatomical details.
description_view_0: The underside of the crab is visible, showing the flat, segmented belly and the inward curve of the legs and claws.
description_view_1: A three-quarter rear view highlights the curvature of the legs and the asymmetry of the claws, with the larger claw prominently displayed.
description_view_2: A direct top-down view reveals the full breadth of the carapace, both claws, and all eight legs splayed outward.
description_view_3: A three-quarter front view emphasizes the forward projection of the claws and the detailed segmentation of the legs.
